name: Aging delays resolution of acute inflammation in mice: reprogramming the host response with novel nano-proresolving medicines
short_name: Aged mice resolution deficit and nano-proresolving medicines
summary: A 2014 mouse peritonitis and lipid-mediator study showing delayed inflammation resolution and reduced SPMs with aging, with DHA and aspirin-triggered resolvin nano-proresolving medicines activating resolution pathways.
